description:
rendering modes (§55.8). code fails length + pattern (2 errors); name fails length (1 error). Three anchors: renders the FIRST error only (1 .scrml-error

); renders the full array (2); is the compound ROLLUP across all fields (3 = code's 2 + name's 1).
rationale:
§55.8: default render wraps the first error as

; the `all` flag renders the whole array; of=@compound rolls up every field's errors. The wrapper element+class are SPEC-normative structure (asserted via .scrml-error count); the message TEXT inside is impl-freedom (never asserted). State carries the impl-neutral tag arrays.
